layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Control Room Grid. Data-dense, tight spacing. Every pixel utilized.
layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Tight (gap-4 or gap-6 for macro, p-2 or p-4 for micro). Generous only on pure marketing/login pages.
layout_and_spacing.surfaces: Grid Borders (The Technical Look). Expose the skeleton. Pure HTML + Tailwind CSS for structural grid. No soft shadows, flat 1px borders.
layout_and_spacing.border_radius: rounded-none or rounded-[2px] to maintain a rigid technical/utilitarian feel.

components_strategy.general: Shadcn components heavily customized. Remove default Vercel-look radius (make them 0 or 2px max) and remove soft shadows. Flat and sharp.
components_strategy.tables: Dense, tabular data is king. Sticky headers. JetBrains Mono font for all numbers. 1px borders everywhere (border-collapse). Hover states on rows.
components_strategy.forms: Small inputs, minimal padding (e.g., h-8 instead of default h-10). Sharp edges. Focus ring should use the Amber accent color.
components_strategy.buttons: Utilitarian. Primary CTA is Amber (#F59E0B) with dark Navy text (#0F172A). Solid, no gradients. Hover states slightly darker amber.
components_strategy.panels: Collapsible side panels (for document manager) and top panels (for project header). Use 1px border separation.

motion_and_interaction.philosophy: Minimalist. No bouncing or playful physics. Fast, precise state changes. Think CAD software.
motion_and_interaction.hover_states: Hard background shifts (e.g., bg-slate-800 to bg-slate-700), pure functional feedback.

media.icons: lucide-react (use at size 16 or 14 for dense UI, 1.5 stroke width for technical feel)

image_urls.description: Architectural blueprint on dark background for drawing viewer empty state or login screen.
High-resolution close-up of an architectural floor plan.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure all text, especially amber on navy, passes WCAG AA contrast ratio.
accessibility_and_testing.testing: All interactive elements (buttons, inputs, links, tabs) MUST have data-testid attributes.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install required fonts via Google Fonts: Chivo, IBM Plex Sans, JetBrains Mono.
Configure Tailwind with the specified color palette (slate-900/slate-800 for navy/charcoal base, amber-500 for accents).
Customize Shadcn UI components to have rounded-none or rounded-[2px], removing all default soft shadows.
Build the BOQ Take-off sheet as a dense HTML table or CSS grid with sticky headers, and strictly use JetBrains Mono for number columns.
Implement the 'Control Room' dense grid layout for the dashboard.
